title: EXCELERATORS - 211info
text: SPARK ON 7TH EXCELERATORS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides accelerated education, training, certifications, and hands-on paid internships with a focus on culinary, technology, healthcare, and manufacturing jobs. Transportation assistance, required PPE (personal protective equipment), other work-related gear, and lunch are also provided. 22 W 7th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: All programs: Ages 18-24 Healthcare program: Must pass a drug test, background check, and have up-to-date vaccinations (hepatitis B, varicella, MMR, flu), and must meet mandatory attendance requirements Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 654-4095 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 654-4095 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to see if registration is open FEES: Training and internship pay $17 per hour DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Youth Employment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - ELEVATE EMPLOYMENT - SPARK If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SPARK ON 7TH
